title: Saylor turns up heat with ‘110 reasons’ why BIP-110 is a bad idea
summary: The man in control of the biggest Bitcoin corporate treasury said he shares the objectives but disagrees about the remedy detailed in the proposed temporary fork.

title: Upbit parent Dunamu faces South Korean regulator sanctions process: Report
summary: Korea’s Virtual Asset User Protection Act lacks explicit sanctions provisions for hacking and similar incidents, clouding the scope of penalties facing the Upbit operator Dunamu.
